visual_style: Clean, aspirational, cinematic. Mix of warm and cool tones.
cultural_tone: Direct but authentic. Americans value personal stories and 'life hack' framing. Casual, confident, slightly self-deprecating humor works.
travel_angles: Bucket list trip on a budget
hooks_that_work: I found a $XX flight and literally screamed
This is the travel hack airlines hate
POV: you find a flight for under $...
soft_sell_style: Mention TICKETS as the tool that made the discovery possible — 'I was scrolling TICKETS on a Tuesday' or 'checked TICKETS just to see'. Never hard sell.
localization_constraints: Reference US airports (JFK, LAX, ORD, MIA, SFO, ATL)
